contract_summary: Set-wrapper: allocates a new drv_struct (whose first member is a cache_coherency_ops_inst) and initializes its embedded kref to 1, establishing the initial reference. Returns a pointer to the newly allocated object, or NULL on allocation failure. The caller must check the return value and, on success, holds one reference that must later be released via the corresponding put function (e.g., cache_coherency_ops_instance_put). The object’s refcount lifecycle begins with this call.
